chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S- 42 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on o/’objections 2.For orders on CMA 112/25 3.For hearing of main case 14-04-2025 None present for the petitioners. **** Neither petitioners nor their counsel is present; no intimation is received; same was the position on last date of hearing, which shows that the petitioners and their counsel are not interested in proceeding with this petition. Result thereof, instant petition along with listed application(s) is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
